description: br ready is empty and the only in-progress bead is the active cod-a no-gaps parent. Add a no-mock fnp-python conformance test for numpy.trim_zeros non-ndarray public surfaces: list fallback, tuple fallback, scalar error parity, uppercase trim mode, and invalid trim error text/type. Validate with rch cargo check -p fnp-python --tests and UBS on crates/fnp-python/tests/conformance_trim_zeros.rs.
title: [test][fnp-python] Add trim_zeros Python-container differential conformance

description: br ready remains empty and cod-b owns the only specific active fnp-python bead. Add a no-mock differential regression test for Generator.poisson. The existing PCG64DXSM hardcoded goldens lock poisson(3.0, 10) and poisson(20.0, 10), but there is no FNP_ORACLE_PYTHON-backed live NumPy oracle for either small-lambda multiplicative or large-lambda PTRS stream. Compare against numpy.random.Generator(np.random.PCG64DXSM(12345)).poisson(...). Validate with rch cargo check -p fnp-random and UBS on crates/fnp-random/src/lib.rs.
title: [test][fnp-random] Add live NumPy oracle for poisson streams
